title: OutcomeSpec v1
description: Domain-neutral outcome measurement contract: declares what is measured, over what window, against what benchmark, and with what evidence requirements.

outcome_spec_id.description: Canonical outcome specification identifier. Format: OUT-YYYY-NNNN.

outcome_version.description: Monotonically increasing version. Start at 1. Increment on any field change after initial commit.

outcome_family.description: Human-readable family label for grouping related outcome specifications.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric being measured.

anchor.description: Reference point or event that anchors the measurement window.

start_offset.description: Offset from the anchor to the start of the measurement window.

end_offset.description: Offset from the anchor to the end of the measurement window.

window_unit.description: Unit of the window offsets and embargo.

window_start_policy.description: Policy for determining the start of the measurement window.

window_end_policy.description: Policy for determining the end of the measurement window.

window_role.description: Role of this measurement window in the validation lifecycle.

labeling_scheme.description: How observations within the window are labeled.

return_basis.description: Mathematical definition of the return being computed.

benchmark_policy.description: Policy for selecting or constructing the benchmark.

benchmark_ref.description: Reference to an external benchmark specification.

observation_count_policy.description: Policy for counting observations in the measurement window.

min_observations.description: Minimum observations required for a valid window.

max_observations.description: Maximum observations in the window. 0 means unlimited.

requires_min_observations.description: Whether the measurement window must meet the minimum observation count.

evidence_role_requirements.description: Evidence requirements for this outcome specification.

requires_uncertainty.description: Requires uncertainty or confidence interval evidence.

requires_purge_embargo.description: Requires purge and embargo gap application.

requires_min_observations.description: Requires minimum observation count to be satisfied.

purge_embargo_policy.description: Purge and embargo policy to prevent look-ahead bias.

purge_gap_days.description: Purge gap in days between training and measurement windows. Integer >= 0.

embargo_fraction.description: Embargo as a fraction of the measurement window [0, 1].

overlap_policy.description: Policy for handling overlapping observations between windows.

event_alignment_policy.description: Policy for aligning events within the measurement window.

sample_start_policy.description: Policy for determining the start of the sample period.

sample_end_policy.description: Policy for determining the end of the sample period.

uncertainty_required.description: Whether uncertainty quantification is required for this outcome.

model_assessment_refs.description: References to ModelAssessmentSpec records that evaluated this outcome.

runner_output_refs.description: References to runner outputs computed against this outcome.

trial_ledger_refs.description: References to TrialLedger entries associated with this outcome.

review_packet_refs.description: References to ReviewPacket records that reviewed this outcome.

extension_hooks.description: Reserved for future artifact references only. Must not contain computed statistics.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of outcome specification declaration.

reviewer.description: Human reviewer metadata for this outcome specification. Must be an object with at minimum a name field.
